steps.title: Identify the growth multiplier
steps.content: An $8\%$ annual increase means one year after the starting point the population is $3000(1.08)=3240$. Enter $x_1=[0,1]$, $y_1=[3000,3240]$, and $y_1\sim a b^{x_1}$ in Desmos.

steps.title: Build the exponential formula
steps.content: Desmos gives $a=3000$ and $b=1.08$, so after $x$ years the model is $p=3000(1.08)^x$. This matches choice D.
